sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n106782" key="u(paggeleu/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπαγγελεύς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">έως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n106782.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">messenger,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἑπόμενος ὡς βασιλεῖ . . ὑπαγγελεύς</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Jul.Laod.</author> </bibl> </cit> in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.136</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
